examples.title: Water-Borne Disease Risk Assessment
examples.description: Algorithm to assess risk level of water-borne disease outbreak in an area
examples.explanation: This pseudocode evaluates factors like water source quality, sanitation infrastructure, and recent disease cases to calculate risk level for water-borne disease outbreak.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CalculateOutbreakRisk
BEGIN
 INPUT: waterSource, sanitationLevel, hygienePractice, recentCases
 
 score = 0
 
 // Water Source Assessment
 IF waterSource == "unprotected" THEN
 score = score + 3
 ELSE IF waterSource == "partiallyProtected" THEN
 score = score + 1
 ELSE // protected
 score = score + 0
 ENDIF
 
 // Sanitation Level
 IF sanitationLevel == "poor" THEN
 score = score + 3
 ELSE IF sanitationLevel == "fair" THEN
 score = score + 1
 ELSE // good
 score = score + 0
 ENDIF
 
 // Hygiene Practices
 IF hygienePractice == "poor" THEN
 score = score + 2
 ELSE IF hygienePractice == "moderate" THEN
 score = score + 1
 ELSE // good
 score = score + 0
 ENDIF
 
 // Recent Cases
 score = score + recentCases
 
 // Risk Classification
 IF score >= 7 THEN
 RETURN "HIGH RISK - Immediate intervention needed"
 ELSE IF score >= 4 THEN
 RETURN "MODERATE RISK - Monitor and improve conditions"
 ELSE
 RETURN "LOW RISK - Maintain current practices"
 ENDIF
END
